hooks.name: omg-session-start
hooks.description: Bridge Gemini CLI lifecycle startup hooks into oh-my-gemini's internal hook registry.

hooks.name: omg-before-agent
hooks.description: Run oh-my-gemini prompt routing, project-memory, and learned-pattern hooks before each turn.

hooks.name: omg-before-tool
hooks.description: Bridge Gemini CLI tool invocations into oh-my-gemini's permission and policy hooks.

hooks.name: omg-after-tool
hooks.description: Bridge Gemini CLI tool responses into oh-my-gemini's recovery and tracking hooks.

hooks.name: omg-pre-compress
hooks.description: Run oh-my-gemini checkpoint hooks before Gemini CLI compacts history.

hooks.name: omg-session-end
hooks.description: Bridge Gemini CLI shutdown hooks into oh-my-gemini's session summary and cleanup hooks.
